steps.title: Use the causal clue
steps.content: The passage says the extinction factors can be tied directly to human presence. That means humans are presented as causing or setting off the decrease in biodiversity.

steps.title: Choose the cause
steps.content: A reverses timing, B means extended in duration, and C means worked against the decrease. The word meaning initiated or set off matches the causal relationship in the text. The answer is D.
